creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Fri, Nov 23, 2001 at 07:15:42PM -0800, ijliao@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Perl ports not $LOCALBASE clean
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports->portmgr
> Responsible-Changed-By: ijliao
> Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Nov 23 19:15:21 PST 2001
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> over to maintainer
> 
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=32234

Actually, I would prefer to MFC BSDPAN to -stable instead.  BSDPAN
solves this problem neatly in -current already.  I just need to build my
-stable box with BSDPAN and live with it for a week.

=Anton.
